_comment: Deterministic stub model output for the SaaS case. Same deliberate-error pattern as the NDA: one spurious clause (indemnification), one wrong severity (limitation_of_liability flagged low, expected medium), one over-flag (service_levels), one fabricated citation.

clauses.text: 99.5% monthly uptime target on commercially reasonable efforts.
Processes personal data only on documented instructions.
Liability capped at trailing twelve months of fees.
Auto-renews for twelve-month terms; 90 days notice to stop.
Customer indemnifies Provider against third-party claims.

risk_flags.rationale: 90-day notice window makes the renewal easy to miss.

citations.quote: commercially reasonable efforts to maintain 99.5% monthly uptime
process Customer Personal Data only on documented instructions
total liability under this Agreement shall not exceed the fees paid in the twelve (12) months preceding the claim
ninety (90) days written notice prior to the end of the then-current term
Provider may terminate immediately for any reason without notice
